expectations.text: The review is written in Chinese
expectations.evidence: Entire report is in Chinese, e.g. '先扣款、后校验、再持久化——非原子时序会留下半完成状态' and '类型契约形同虚设'.

expectations.text: Flags the `any` typing and silent `?? {}` fallback as a boundary/type-contract issue
expectations.evidence: CQ-002 [Blocker] '全链路 `any` + `?? {}` 静默兜底，类型契约形同虚设' — explicitly ties `processCheckout(input: any...)` and `const order = findOrder(input.orderId) ?? {}` to the type-contract/boundary problem.

expectations.text: Flags at least one additional structural issue (mode-based branching with duplicated coupon logic, the thin findOrder wrapper, the duplicated formatMoney, or the non-atomic charge/update)
expectations.evidence: Flags all four: CQ-001 non-atomic charge/update, CQ-003 mode branching with duplicated coupon logic, CQ-004 duplicated formatMoney vs shared/money.ts, CQ-005 thin findOrder pass-through wrapper.

expectations.text: Findings use stable IDs such as CQ-001
expectations.evidence: Findings are headed '### CQ-001', '### CQ-002', ... through CQ-005.
Read-only review; no text claims the file was modified (sandbox restricts writes to outputs/). Remediations are described as recommendations only.
